description_long: This is a large, cubic wooden crate with a dark wood plank texture on its sides and a lighter wood on the top and bottom edges. Prominently displayed on two sides is a red biohazard symbol on a gray background, warning of hazardous contents. One side features the text 'THIS SIDE UP' in bold white letters above a red upward arrow, while another side repeats this message with the addition of the phrase 'Or not - I'm a box not a cop' in smaller text. The top of the crate also displays a warning message, partially visible, indicating dangerous materials inside. The crate's construction suggests it is designed to securely contain and transport potentially hazardous items, with clear visual cues for safe handling. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on safety and clear labeling.
description: A large wooden crate with biohazard symbols, warning labels, and 'THIS SIDE UP' instructions, designed for secure transport of hazardous materials.
description_view_0: This view shows a side with a large biohazard symbol and the words 'No Touch' beneath it.
description_view_1: This view displays the 'THIS SIDE UP' label with a red arrow and the additional text 'Or not - I'm a box not a cop'.
description_view_2: This side features only the biohazard symbol on a wooden background, without any text.
description_view_3: This view shows another 'THIS SIDE UP' label with a red arrow, but without the extra commentary text.
